case_title: CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES VS. FP CONSTRUCTION INC. et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, 302, NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION (HEARING SET FOR MAR-27-2013) IS OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY.

COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF DRYAWALL/LATHING, METAL FRAMING & INTERIORS SYSTEMS LOCAL UNION 9144
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-27-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MARCH 27, 2013 TO GIVE CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 27, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration; Index
Off Calendar Mar-01-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration; Index
Off Calendar Feb-27-2013 Continued To Mar-27-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration is continued on the court's own motion to March 27, 2013 to give Carpenters 46 Northern California Counties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Carpenters 46 Northern California Counties must deliver courtesy copies of its moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 27, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)
